☆Requested?☆ Nope. Made by my ass only :]

!ATTENTION! IN THIS AU EVERYONE HAS NO POWERS! THIS TAKES PLACE ON EARTH! I MADE THEM MORE HUMANOID! ALSO, LUCIFER AND CHARLIE ARE NOT PARENT AND DAUGHTER IN THIS AU! NO FATHER AND DAUGHTER SINCE THEY ARE BOTH STUDENTS IN THIS AU! I'LL MAKE THEM BROTHER AND SISTER IN THIS AU!

Update: Added Vox! I probably will add Velvette and Valentino later, but I'm afraid it will glitch out. (Also I had to make him more young-looking because his human form is a 40-50 year old man).

Yapping of the day: Did you know that if you blew up the school, it wouldn't be legal? :3 (don't do it)

☆________________________________________☆

You decide what you're doing!

Characters included: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie Morningstar, Alastor, Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, Vaggie, Adam, God, Lute, Vox
《I may add more characters in the future!》

♤________________________________________♤
I tried to do is as accurate as humanly possible, so I'm really sorry if there are any bugs or mistakes. I tried so had to give it details and make it as accurate as I could. Hope you'll enjoy it.

Smile and spread joy around you! Maybe you can be the reason why someone smiles today! :D
